rules: Never assign font-family directly inside components.
Always use design tokens, typography components, or approved utility classes.
Sans is default for platform UI.
Serif is reserved for research, whitepapers, essays, and institutional long-form content.
Mono is reserved for code, logs, traces, terminal, protocol, and agent execution text.
Never randomly mix serif and sans in one context.
A:// prefix must remain visually consistent.
